text1: A Pilum with its EMP generator stripped in favor of a small-scale hyperdrive. Fires a group of missiles that execute a small-scale transverse jump to emerge close to the target.

A common Typhoon Reaper launcher with the better half of a hyperspace drive bolted onto it for good measure. Utilizes the ship's flux grid to create a short-lived portal.
"If you can throw it at a planet, you can throw it at a ship. It's not that difficult so shut your trap and give me that tank."
